prs_reviewed.title: frontend: Fix Backstage receiver listener leak on Home remount
feat: Add configurable external links to sidebar via Helm values
frontend: Add @typescript/native-preview and use it for type checking
helm: Fix file descriptor leak in createFullPath
frontend: themes: Replace deprecated MediaQueryList listener methods
backend: k8cache: Bypass non-API cluster paths
frontend: units: Fix parseRam not handling milli-bytes (m) suffix
frontend: ObjectEventList: Fix Age column text clipping in details panel
frontend: Export ApiError from K8s package for plugin access
backend: Config: Add a testcase for Headlamp kubeconfig paths.

style_guide: Commit subject format: `<area>: <SubArea>: Description` — description starts with capital letter.
Keep commit subject under 72 characters (soft limit).
Do NOT include auto-close keywords in commit messages.
Approval style is warm and brief; @illume is primary maintainer.
copilot-pull-request-reviewer[bot] is NOT human review activity.
k8s-ci-robot posts bot comments — do not count as human review.
Frontend: fix exhaustive-deps violations; Material-UI v5 patterns.
Backend: comma-ok type assertions; structured logging via slog.
Tests required for both frontend (Vitest) and backend (Go test).
CNCF CLA is a hard merge blocker.
@illume reviews PRs very quickly; rebase-main requested consistently.
PRs with merge-main commits will receive rebase request from @illume.
